name: NSE S.A.
summary: NSE S.A. designs, builds, and sells integrated systems for defense, aerospace, electronics, information technology, telecommunications, and large-scale industries in France and internationally. The company offers night vision products, including NVIS modifications and equipment; flight data monitoring and tracking products comprising data transmission systems and brite saver, a flight recorder; geo tracking products, such as satellite and GSM/GPRS solutions, as well as tracking beacons; and railway signaling products, including train and tram signaling products. It also offers integration services, which include designing and integration of complex wired structures and embedded devices; designing and implementation of wiring; and designing of avionics equipment. In addition, the company provides defense support, civil and defense aerospace, general aviation, and electronics and IT services. NSE S.A. was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Nizerolles, France.
